_correction.by: Claude Code task-015 entity-architecture correction (preparation for PR 3 W1 task 022)
_correction.reason: Owner clarified Spaarke uses sprk_event (with sprk_eventtype_ref = Task discriminator) for tasks. Original repo file used OOB task activity entity incorrectly. Corrected per CLAUDE.md § '2026-06-25 — Spaarke entity architecture'. Spec FR-7 'Dedupe by activityid' is wrong — corrected to sprk_eventid here. Added LookupUserMembership branch + membership-scope FetchXml union (W1 task 022 will verify + deploy).
_correction.alsoAdded: Membership-scope branch via LookupUserMembership (ActionType 52) — R4 FR-7 target; deployed PB-021 currently LACKS this; PR 3 W1 task 022 deploys this corrected state.

playbook.name: Tasks Overdue
playbook.description: Identifies Task-type sprk_event records (sprk_eventtype_ref = Task) past their due date on the user's matters and creates notifications for each overdue item. Uses Spaarke custom sprk_event entity (NOT OOB task activity).

configJson.description: Scoped to the current user's matters (resolved via LookupUserMembership node)
Resolve the executing user's matter memberships per ADR-034. Bound to `myMatters.ids` for downstream filtering.

configJson.fetchXml: <fetch top="50"><entity name="sprk_event"><attribute name="sprk_eventname"/><attribute name="sprk_duedate"/><attribute name="sprk_finalduedate"/><attribute name="sprk_eventid"/><attribute name="sprk_eventtype_ref"/><attribute name="statuscode"/><attribute name="modifiedon"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingrecordname"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingrecordurl"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingmatter"/><attribute name="ownerid"/><link-entity name="sprk_matter" from="sprk_matterid" to="sprk_regardingmatter" link-type="outer" alias="m"><attribute name="sprk_mattername"/><attribute name="ownerid"/></link-entity><filter type="and"><condition attribute="sprk_eventtype_ref" operator="eq" value="124f5fc9-98ff-f011-8406-7c1e525abd8b"/><condition attribute="statuscode" operator="eq" value="659490001"/><filter type="or"><condition attribute="sprk_duedate" operator="lt" value="{{todayUtc}}"/><condition attribute="sprk_finalduedate" operator="lt" value="{{todayUtc}}"/></filter><filter type="or"><condition attribute="sprk_regardingmatter" operator="in" value="{{joinIds myMatters.ids}}"/><condition entityname="m" attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/><condition attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/></filter></filter><order attribute="sprk_finalduedate" descending="false"/><order attribute="sprk_duedate" descending="false"/></entity></fetch>
configJson.description: Open Task-type sprk_events (sprk_eventtype_ref = Task GUID 124f5fc9-…, statuscode=Open 659490001) with sprk_duedate OR sprk_finalduedate before today. Membership-scope union: (a) sprk_regardingmatter IN myMatters.ids OR (b) record-owner OR (c) matter-owner = current user. Sort: sprk_finalduedate asc, sprk_duedate asc tiebreaker. Dedupe by sprk_eventid (NOT activityid).
Check if any overdue tasks were found
